headline: Exelon's Finance Transformation Success with PowerPlan to be Showcased at Oracle Customer Edge Summit
summary: Utility's Journey Demonstrates Enterprise-Wide Results Across Operations, Accounting, Tax, and Regulatory FunctionsATLANTA, April 07, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- PowerPlan, a leading provider of financial software solutions for asset-intensive industries, today announced it will present alongside Exelon, Oracle, and Deloitte at the upcoming Oracle Customer Edge Summit. The joint session will highlight how strategic collaboration delivered measurable business results for one of North America's large
